title: Kofi and the Lost Baby Elephant
synopsis: A kind-hearted boy named Kofi helps a lost baby elephant find its way back to its family in the African savanna, making new animal friends along the way.

pages.text: Kofi loved exploring the golden grasslands near his home. The warm sun made everything glow like honey.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing a young boy with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking through tall golden grass in warm savanna colors with an orange sunset in the background, painted with bold confident strokes

pages.text: One morning, Kofi heard a sad trumpeting sound. Behind a big acacia tree, he found a tiny baby elephant crying.

illustration.description: A textured painterly gouache scene showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes discovering a small elephant calf near an acacia tree, painted with thick brushstrokes in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Kofi finding a crying baby elephant

pages.text: "Don't worry, little one," Kofi said gently. "I'll help you find your family."

illustration.description: An expressive gouache painting showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes kneeling beside the baby elephant, both rendered with bold confident strokes against golden grass and warm sunset colors

pages.text: Kofi and the baby elephant walked together. They met a tall giraffe who stretched his long neck high.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking alongside a baby elephant while meeting an expressive giraffe painted in warm savanna colors with textured painterly technique
illustration.alt: Kofi, baby elephant, and giraffe meeting

pages.text: "Have you seen elephant families?" asked Kofi. The giraffe pointed toward the watering hole with his head.

illustration.description: An expressive gouache scene with bold confident strokes showing the giraffe pointing while Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes listens, painted in warm savanna colors with golden grass all around
illustration.alt: Giraffe pointing the way for Kofi

pages.text: Next, they met playful monkeys swinging in the trees. The monkeys chattered and pointed the same direction.

illustration.description: A textured painterly gouache painting showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes and the baby elephant looking up at expressive monkeys in trees, painted with thick brushstrokes in warm savanna colors and orange sunset hues
illustration.alt: Monkeys helping Kofi and baby elephant

pages.text: At the watering hole, they heard happy trumpeting. A big elephant family was splashing and playing in the water.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with bold confident strokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes and the baby elephant approaching a watering hole where expressive adult elephants play, painted in warm savanna colors with golden grass
illustration.alt: Elephant family at the watering hole

pages.text: The baby elephant ran to his mama with joy. She wrapped him in her trunk and trumpeted with happiness.

illustration.description: An expressive gouache scene with thick brushstrokes showing the baby elephant reuniting with its mother while Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes watches happily, painted in textured painterly style with warm savanna colors and orange sunset

pages.text: Kofi smiled as the elephant family thanked him. He waved goodbye and walked home as the golden sun set behind him.

illustration.description: A warm gouache painting with bold confident strokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes waving goodbye to the grateful elephant family, painted with thick brushstrokes in golden grass with a beautiful orange sunset backdrop
illustration.alt: Kofi waving goodbye to elephant family at sunset

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What did Kofi find behind the acacia tree?
questions.explanation: Kofi found a sad baby elephant crying behind the big acacia tree.

questions.question: Which animal pointed toward the watering hole?
questions.explanation: The tall giraffe stretched his neck and pointed toward the watering hole with his head.

questions.question: How did the mama elephant show she was happy?
questions.explanation: The mama elephant wrapped her baby in her trunk and trumpeted with happiness when they were reunited.

questions.question: What was Kofi doing at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: Kofi waved goodbye to the elephant family and walked home as the golden sun set behind him.
